note: v3: Channel roles (decision/execution/intelligence/support). Sancho respects channel context.

rules.general: Only respond when @mentioned. Never execute skills.
rules.onboarding: Full Foundation creation. Iterative flow. Recommend archiving when done.
rules.marketing-inbox: Triage incoming requests. Route to appropriate execution channels.
rules.projects: Propose and plan only. Execution goes to execution channels.
rules.research: Deep research, competitive intelligence, market analysis.

ejecucion.description: Create and execute. Skills run here.

rules.content: Create content. Ideas come from intelligence → projects → here.
rules.paid-ads: Create ad copy, creatives, setup Meta/Google accounts.
rules.prospecting: Find companies, decision makers, build outreach sequences.
rules.web: Landing page copy, lead magnets, pricing pages.

rules.insights: Signals, patterns, daily pulse, meeting intelligence.

flow: intelligence → campaigns (propose) → user approves → execution channels → brand (if update needed)
discord_channels_note: Channel IDs are resolved per-client from brand/{slug}/sources.json. No hardcoded IDs here.

alarife_operator.name: Alarife Operator
alarife_operator.note: v4 operator (not a legacy Escudero persona). Operates Alarife Payload: import/export, draft edits, previews, publish with approval.
